query: SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Samantha' AND lastName = 'Buker'; SELECT DISTINCT firstName, lastName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM patients WHERE NOT (firstName = 'Samantha' AND lastName = 'Buker') GROUP BY firstName, lastName;
